def: Lasting for a very short time.
The pleasant smell of earth after the first rain.
Sweet or musical; pleasant to hear.
Representing the most perfect example of a quality.
The occurrence of events by chance in a happy way.
Present, appearing, or found everywhere.
Last but one in a series; second to last.
Vivacious and enthusiastic; bubbling.
Denoting a period of time that was idyllically happy.
Too great or extreme to be expressed in words.
Looking or sounding sad and dismal.
Subject to sudden or unpredictable changes of mood.
Having a strong spiritual or otherworldly quality.
To render obscure, unclear, or unintelligible.
Having a ready insight into and understanding of things.
Exceedingly idealistic; unrealistic and impractical.
To think deeply or carefully about something.
A person who acts obsequiously toward the powerful.
Reserved or uncommunicative in speech.
A change of circumstances or fortune, often unwelcome.
A strong desire to travel and explore the world.
A soft, gentle breeze.
A state of serene calmness; freedom from emotional disturbance.
To throw someone or something out of a window.
Mental calmness in a difficult situation.
Characterized by the use of long words.
Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
The realization each passerby lives a life as vivid as your own.
The state of being infatuated or obsessed with another person.
Just begun and so not fully formed or developed.
Optimistic or positive, especially in a difficult situation.
Stubbornly resistant to authority or guidance.
Showing a casual lack of concern; indifferent.
Translucently clear; easily understood.
Glowing, gleaming, or flickering with a soft radiance.
The view that only the self is sure to exist.
Excessively talkative, especially on trivial matters.
Having an unemotional and stolidly calm disposition.
To think deeply about something; to meditate or reflect.
A person with a particular appreciation of beauty.
Little known; abstruse; difficult to understand.
Unique; of its own kind; in a class by itself.
A deep emotional state of nostalgic longing.
Having or showing great knowledge or learning.
Annoyed, frustrated, or worried.
Quick and agile, especially of a boat; nimble.
A heavy base supporting a statue, vase, or column.
A person or thing that is the center of attention.
Reserved, modest, and shy.
Tending to talk a great deal.
